positives: No cancellations reported in insurance history from 2020 through 2024.
Multi-year insurance history provided with established national/regional carriers.
Named insured and additional insured schedule provided.
Nine scheduled locations identified across Ohio and Pennsylvania.
concerns: Claims frequency appears elevated, with 10 to 13 claims in 2022-2024.
Large warehouse footprint across multiple locations may increase property and operational exposure.
Service/repair operations at one location may add operational hazard exposure.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Insurance history shows claims counts of 4 in 2020, 7 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, and 10 in 2024. No cancellations reported for any year. Loss ratios were not provided.
